THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAHIB, ANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3161 16TH STREET #310, S.F. $1,525.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,525.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-27-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, UNTIL 09:00AM.
